# Sagyboar

> Sagyboar is an AI-native DevOps platform for deployment, monitoring, diagnosis, and managed engineering. Teams deploy from any Git provider or registry, operate with AI-assisted monitoring and self-healing, and scale from Indie yearly plans to fully managed Team BYOC infrastructure — without hiring a full DevOps department.

- Website: https://sagyboar.space
- Dashboard: https://dashboard.sagyboar.space
- Support: help@sagyboar.space

## Agent crawler files

- [Full product knowledge base](https://sagyboar.space/llms-full.txt): Detailed features, solutions, pricing, and how the platform works
- [Domain summary](https://sagyboar.space/sagyboar.space.md): Quick reference for AI agents crawling sagyboar.space
- [Legacy full KB](https://sagyboar.space/Sagyboar.md): Backward-compatible markdown export

## Product

- [Home](https://sagyboar.space/): Platform overview
- [About](https://sagyboar.space/about): Mission and team
- [Features](https://sagyboar.space/features): All platform capabilities
- [Pricing](https://sagyboar.space/pricing): Indie (USD/year) and Team BYOC (USD/month) plans
- [Product intro video](https://sagyboar.space/watch/intro): 22-second platform tour (watch page for video indexing)

## Features

- [Application Deployment](https://sagyboar.space/features/application-deployment)
- [CI/CD & Git Integration](https://sagyboar.space/features/ci-cd-git-integration)

- [AI Error Diagnosis](https://sagyboar.space/features/ai-error-diagnosis)
- [Autonomous Self-Healing](https://sagyboar.space/features/autonomous-self-healing)
- [Database Management](https://sagyboar.space/features/database-management)
- [Multi-Server & Infrastructure](https://sagyboar.space/features/multi-server-infrastructure)
- [Notifications & Alerting](https://sagyboar.space/features/notifications-alerting)
- [Managed Team Services](https://sagyboar.space/features/managed-team-services)
- [Weekly Code Review](https://sagyboar.space/features/weekly-code-review)
- [Security & Access Control](https://sagyboar.space/features/platform-security-access-control)

## Solutions

- [Hobby](https://sagyboar.space/solutions/hobby): Solo developers and MVPs
- [Startup](https://sagyboar.space/solutions/startup): Growing teams without a full DevOps hire
- [Enterprise](https://sagyboar.space/solutions/enterprise): Dedicated infrastructure and managed platform team
